title: ci: make the automation release renovate managed
body:
Put the variable in the workflow file like the renovate config expects,
see https://github.com/podman-container-tools/automation/pull/29

To ensure the local runs keep working we need a fall back to parse the
file manually.

Same as the podman change for this which is known to work:
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/commit/8e74c1efd88e39d462e1f4411dc741e5cd9739bb
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/29186

Also update the latest image manually once here while at it.

comments.body:
> There is also SKOPEO_CIDEV_CONTAINER_FQIN, I think that should be consistently Renovate-managed as well.

Thanks, totally forgot we pull the image in here as well, I should have checked more carefully.

> Would you consider not updating the AUTOMATION_RELEASE value in the PR, and letting Renovate do it afterwards, as an immediate opportunity to test this?

Sure fine with me
for the record updates do work: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/container-libs/pull/991
